note: ECS instance metadata saved before teardown. RunCommand blocked by ClashX TUN routing (198.18.19.34 reset), so no live logs. ECS was never used for cyberai deployments — all scans ran locally.
teardown_order: 1. Stop ECS: aliyun ecs StopInstance --InstanceId i-rj98syymj0ved1w5r0lb
2. Unassociate EIP: aliyun ecs UnassociateEipAddress --AllocationId eip-rj9t6iaqitkcykfupuukz --InstanceId i-rj98syymj0ved1w5r0lb
3. Release EIP: aliyun ecs ReleaseEipAddress --AllocationId eip-rj9t6iaqitkcykfupuukz
4. Delete ECS: aliyun ecs DeleteInstance --InstanceId i-rj98syymj0ved1w5r0lb --Force true
5. terraform destroy (for OSS + RAM if already applied)
6. Delete VPC (optional, or reuse for new ECS)
